content: Minecraft itself is not open source, of course, but I used a ton of open source software to set up a server yesterday. My story: https://blog.greptilian.com/2026/04/19/how-a-nintendo-switch-and-a-mac-can-play-on-the-same-minecraft-server/
How long did all that take? (very funny that you casually relate from her friend that they were "cooked")
Yeah, that cracked me up. We actually called our server "uncooked" with the goal of getting uncooked! :smile:
